name: Satispay
description: Satispay — Italy mobile payment network for in-store QR and online payments using direct bank account debit without card intermediaries.

seo.title: Satispay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Satispay: Satispay — Italy mobile payment network for in-store QR and online payments using direct bank account debit without card intermediaries.

when_to_use: In-store QR payments for Italian merchants without card intermediaries
Online checkout via Satispay for Italian e-commerce
Direct bank debit payment for Italian consumers at POS

review.verdict: Attractive low-fee Italian payment method, but only worth it if your customer base skews Italian.
review.best_for: Italian merchants wanting low-fee direct-debit payments without card intermediaries
review.not_for: Merchants whose customers live outside Italy or won't adopt a new wallet
